text: hazaqen el-gayos yedidi asher ani ohev oto beemet
yedidi retsoni sheyitav lekha lekhal-davar vetiheye vari ketov lenafeshekha
ki samacheti meod kaasher bau achim vaya'idu 'al-amitekha asher mitehalekh ata baemet
eyn li simecha gedola milishemo'a et-banay mitehalekhim baemet
asher he'idu 'al-ahavatekha bifeney haqahal veyafe ta'ase leshalach otam karauy lifeney elohim
ki lema'an shemo yatsau velo laqechu davar min-hagoyim
ani khataveti el-haqehila aval dioterifas hamiteave liheyot lahem lerosh eynenu meqabel otanu
'al-ken bevoi azekir et-ma'asayv asher hu 'ose levate 'aleynu devarim ra'im velo day-lo vaze ki gam et-haachim lo yeqabel veyimena' et-hachafetsim leqabelam vayegarashem mitokh haqahal
yedidi al-telekh be'iqevot hara'a ki im-be'iqevot hatov ha'ose tov hu meelohim veha'ose ra' lo raa et-haelohim
'al-dematerios he'idu hakol vegam-haemet 'atsemah vegam-anachenu me'idim 'alayv vida'etem ki 'edutenu neemana
harebe yesh-li likhetov velo chafatseti likhetov eleykha bideyo uveqolamos
aval aqave lireotekha bimehera ufe el-pe nedaber
shalom lakh hare'im shoalim lishelomekha sheal lishelom hare'im leish ish bishemo ﻿
